creator: billf@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I have tried to resolve this with some Makefile logic. However I don't 
believe the configure script for this program is working as advertised. 

Ideally, I could write my own do-install target, but for now I've simply 
upgraded this port and fed it the correct information (even though it 
doesn't seem to respect my wishes). 

This port doesn't function any _worse_ however. :>
